title: A Fine Sin
description: Exploring struggle with identity and societal pressure.
lyrics: So I'm going to attempt to convey an idea, a nigh, a feeling, or better yet, a sentiment. All the feelings you strive to hide and leave fermenting, a slave, a want, a need, oh please, oh please, please, please, for me, please, please. That which I thought I would never willingly take part in, somehow is the plague that the vipers bite and just in my life spit, every day is constant, hollow congratulation of how I'm proud of how I maintain a vigilant chain of actions that I believe have blinded my mind, to which I am warranted, 95% of people might be lying or downright conniving, their will to control my life, the way they be aligning, a fine end to all of life, a fine sin, not an agree, you'll have been blindsided, cell you take the substance that goes in a dark ring, point, hypo, shh, you can't say that shit, oh word, we forgot to hella place a non-violent stone waste in sticks like fatty glue, balance to you and me, can I get at least a key, like see, you got to understand, gee, yeah, the vipers bite, cloud in my mind, a slave, a slave, till the end of time, a hypocrite to past morals, I said fuck that I'd rather die, the vipers bite, cloud in my mind, a slave, a slave, till the end of time, a hypocrite to past morals, I said fuck that I'd rather die, and yet like honest Abe I'm still alive, so if I broke morals of old, does that make me a bastard or so some sort of pussy or bitch, cause if that's what it do then bet nigga bet, sticks and stones, if I ain't gotten 50 new haters talking shit by my birthday fam, then I'm failing my whole entire life fam, how sad, cause the toxin from breaking bad flow in my neural system every which way, every all day, and I'm high as in burgers chili even though my bars are roasting at 50 degrees kelvin or something, you get the wordplay, hope not, oh shit, nar, driving me crazy from afar, psyched me lady, plagued me baby, till this story's less than heavy, off inside us, we barely dust rust, needing rust over touch, it gets deep, y'all hear, fear is near, y'all hear, no one is sincere, we coming in clear, out and over ghosts of me, keeping it dark below, never letting go, all I know is, the vipers bite, cloud in my mind, a slave, a slave, till the end of time, a hypocrite to past morals, I said fuck that I'd rather die, all day, all day, no way, no way, vipers bite, cloud in my mind, a slave, a slave, till the end of time, a hypocrite to past morals, fuck that I'd rather die, we'd be a scribe and a gemini, two men that have looked death in the eye, come, come now, why would we lie, so you'd believe I'm fucking sly, please, I don't have to resort to such trifle actions, why, I'd be overly sly, all the while singing you the truth, 9.5 times out of 10, cause I'm not the father of Jesus, for the sake of saying believe, buy, defend, faithfully hope to transcend, here's your chance, vote with dice, dice are really dope, so what's it gonna be, truth or false, yin and yang, to be or not to be, it's not life, phenomenal, cosmic, power chain, how about this, I'll count to 10, you ready, 1, 2, 3, 7, 9.5, 10, fly, okay, so what's going on, wait a minute, you're serious, I didn't realize what fear was you saying, well I never thought I'd see the day come out like an hour, the fact that you're somehow, 0, 1, 1, 1, 0, public service, all day, nah, vipers bite, cloud in my mind, a slave, a slave, to the end of time,
